en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER. A MASKIL OF THE SONS OF KORAH. O God, we have heard with our ears, our fathers have told us, what deeds you performed in their days, in the days of old:
zh: 神啊！你在古時， 在我們列祖的日子所作的事， 我們親耳聽見了， 我們的列祖也給我們述說過。

en: you with your own hand drove out the nations, but them you planted; you afflicted the peoples, but them you set free;
zh: 你曾親手把列國趕出去， 卻栽培了我們的列祖； 你曾苦待眾民， 卻使我們的列祖昌盛。

en: for not by their own sword did they win the land, nor did their own arm save them, but your right hand and your arm, and the light of your face, for you delighted in them.
zh: 因為他們取得那地，不是靠自己的刀劍； 他們得勝，也不是靠自己的膀臂； 而是靠你的右手、你的膀臂和你臉上的光， 因為你喜悅他們。

en: You are my King, O God; ordain salvation for Jacob!
zh: 神啊！你是我的王； 求你出令，使雅各得勝。

en: Through you we push down our foes; through your name we tread down those who rise up against us.
zh: 我們靠著你，必打倒我們的敵人； 靠著你的名，必踐踏那些起來攻擊我們的。

en: For not in my bow do I trust, nor can my sword save me.
zh: 因為我不是倚靠我的弓， 我的刀劍也不能使我得勝。

en: But you have saved us from our foes and have put to shame those who hate us.
zh: 但你使我們勝過了我們的敵人， 使憎恨我們的人都羞愧。

en: In God we have boasted continually, and we will give thanks to your name forever. Selah
zh: 我們整天因 神誇耀， 我們要永遠稱讚你的名。

en: But you have rejected us and disgraced us and have not gone out with our armies.
zh: 現在，你卻棄絕我們，使我們受辱， 不再和我們的軍隊一同出征。

en: You have made us turn back from the foe, and those who hate us have gotten spoil.
zh: 你使我們在敵人面前轉身後退； 憎恨我們的人都任意搶掠。

en: You have made us like sheep for slaughter and have scattered us among the nations.
zh: 你使我們像給人宰吃的羊， 把我們分散在列國中。

en: You have sold your people for a trifle, demanding no high price for them.
zh: 你把你的子民廉價出售； 他們的售價並沒有使你得到利益。

en: You have made us the taunt of our neighbors, the derision and scorn of those around us.
zh: 你使我們成為鄰居的羞辱， 成為我們四周的人譏笑和諷刺的對象。

en: You have made us a byword among the nations, a laughingstock among the peoples.
zh: 你使我們在列國中成為話柄， 在萬民中使人搖頭。

en: All day long my disgrace is before me, and shame has covered my face
zh: 我的羞辱整天在我面前， 我臉上的羞愧把我遮蓋了；

en: at the sound of the taunter and reviler, at the sight of the enemy and the avenger.
zh: 都因那辱罵和毀謗的人的聲音， 並因仇敵和報仇者的緣故。

en: All this has come upon us, though we have not forgotten you, and we have not been false to your covenant.
zh: 這一切臨到我們身上，我們卻沒有忘記你， 也沒有違背你的約。

en: Our heart has not turned back, nor have our steps departed from your way;
zh: 我們的心沒有退後， 我們的腳步也沒有偏離你的路。

en: yet you have broken us in the place of jackals and covered us with the shadow of death.
zh: 但你竟在野狗之地把我們壓傷了， 又以死亡的陰影籠罩我們。

en: If we had forgotten the name of our God or spread out our hands to a foreign god,
zh: 如果我們忘記了我們 神的名， 或是向別神伸手禱告；

en: would not God discover this? For he knows the secrets of the heart.
zh: 神不會查究這事嗎？ 因為他知道人心的隱祕。

en: Yet for your sake we are killed all the day long; we are regarded as sheep to be slaughtered.
zh: 為你的緣故，我們終日被置於死地； 人看我們如同將宰的羊。

en: Awake! Why are you sleeping, O Lord? Rouse yourself! Do not reject us forever!
zh: 主啊！求你醒來，為甚麼還睡著呢？ 求你起來，不要永遠棄絕我們。

en: Why do you hide your face? Why do you forget our affliction and oppression?
zh: 你為甚麼掩面， 忘記了我們的苦難和壓迫呢？

en: For our soul is bowed down to the dust; our belly clings to the ground.
zh: 我們俯伏在塵土之上； 我們的身體緊貼地面。

en: Rise up; come to our help! Redeem us for the sake of your steadfast love!
zh: 求你起來幫助我們， 為了你慈愛的緣故救贖我們。
